subject: [PATCH v6 5/6] fuse: add zero-copy over io-uring

2026-07-16.patch_summary: This patch adds zero-copy support to the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) io-uring implementation, allowing for direct access to client pages or page cache folios without intermediate memory copies. The server can specify which open files should use this feature by setting a flag during opens. This requires administrative privileges and is gated behind CAP_SYS_ADMIN. The patch eliminates unnecessary memory copies between the application, kernel, and server for read/write operations, improving performance.
